message: 🌱 Add prometheus: Load scrape configs from multiple files mission (#374)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "prometheus-8543-load-scrape-configs-from-multiple-files",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "prometheus: Load scrape configs from multiple files",
+    "description": "Load scrape configs from multiple files. This issue affects 70+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify prometheus feature symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your prometheus deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=prometheus\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: Load scrape configs from multiple files"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current resource configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant prometheus resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get resource -A\nkubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>\n```\nThis issue is about providing the ability to split Prometheus scrape configs into multiple files.\n\nDesign doc: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1bSehbL_Rzx9_guVgISmara-Ft_FB57q_YxEZtwxE3C8/edit#head"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Load scrape configs from multiple files",
+        "description": "Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:\n```yaml\nglobal: \r\n   scrape_interval: 10s\r\nscrape_configs:\r\n  - job_name: 'prometheus'\r\n    static_configs:\r\n    - targets: ['localhost:9090']\r\nscrape_config_files:\r\n  - blackbox.yml\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Load scrape configs from multiple files is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This issue was resolved by applying the fix from the linked PR. The root cause was identified and addressed by the community.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "global: \r\n   scrape_interval: 10s\r\nscrape_configs:\r\n  - job_name: 'prometheus'\r\n    static_configs:\r\n    - targets: ['localhost:9090']\r\nscrape_config_files:\r\n  - blackbox.yml",
+        "scrape_configs:\r\n - job_name: 'blackbox'\r\n    metrics_path: /probe\r\n    params:\r\n      module: [http_2xx]\r\n    static_configs:\r\n      - targets:\r\n        - http://prometheus.io\r\n        - https://prometheus.io\r\n        - http://example.com:8080\r\n    relabel_configs:\r\n      - source_labels: [__address__]\r\n        target_label: __param_target\r\n      - source_labels: [__param_target]\r\n        target_label: instance\r\n      - target_label: __address__\r\n        replacement: 127.0.0.1:9115  # The blackbox exporter's real hostname:port.",
+        "global:\r\n  scrape_interval: 5s\r\n  evaluation_interval: 15s\r\n\r\nscrape_config_files:\r\n  - /etc/prometheus/scrape_configs/*.yml\r\n\r\nscrape_configs:\r\n  - job_name: prometheus\r\n    static_configs:\r\n      - targets: ['prometheus:9090']"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "prometheus",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "prometheus"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],

+    "issueTypes": [

+    ],

+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/issues/8543",

+      "pr": "https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/pull/8570"
+    },
+    "reactions": 70,
+    "comments": 24,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with prometheus installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
